Variables.Name: Level
Variables.Description: The index value of the LOD level

Variables.Name: bEnabled
Variables.Description: True if the LOD level is enabled, meaning it should be updated and rendered.

Variables.Name: RequiredModule
Variables.Description: The required module for this LOD level

Variables.Name: Modules
Variables.Description: An array of particle modules that contain the adjusted data for the LOD level

Variables.Name: SpawnModule
Variables.Description: The SpawnRateBurst module - required by all emitters.

Variables.Name: SpawningModules
Variables.Description: SpawningModules - These are called to determine how many particles to spawn.

Variables.Name: SpawnModules
Variables.Description: SpawnModules - These are called when particles are spawned.

Variables.Name: UpdateModules
Variables.Description: UpdateModules - These are called when particles are updated.

Variables.Name: OrbitModules
Variables.Description:
OrbitModules 
	 	These are used to do offsets of the sprite from the particle location.
